name: Vinodh
text: The hands-on cloud labs and direct mentoring from senior engineers at EduPrajna completely transformed my skill set. I gained deep experience in AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform, which gave me the confidence to ace my interviews at HCL and secure an amazing 12 LPA package.

name: Prathibha
text: EduPrajna's structured VMware curriculum and mock interview sessions were invaluable. The mentors helped me understand virtualization from the ground up and build real-world deployment projects, leading to my successful placement at TCS as a VMware Cloud Engineer with an 8 LPA package.

name: Keerthana
text: Coming from a non-programming background, Python Fullstack was a challenge, but the mentors supported me at every step. Building complete web applications during the course helped me clear the technical rounds at Klaus easily, landing my first role as a Fullstack Developer at 3.8 LPA.

name: Jithin
text: I am extremely grateful to the placement team at EduPrajna. The intensive projects on cloud computing and CI/CD pipelines matched exactly what companies look for. I secured a Cloud Engineer role at HCL with a 5 LPA package right after completing my training.

name: Prashanth
text: The cyber security training here is top-notch. We worked on actual penetration testing labs and security audits. The practical exposure made it easy for me to demonstrate my skills to the hiring managers at TCS, landing a role as a Cyber Security Analyst with a 6 LPA package.

name: Janani
text: Mastering AWS architecture at EduPrajna was a turning point. The focus on architecture design patterns and DevOps practices prepared me for real-world projects. I cleared the interviews at Wipro for the AWS Cloud Architect role with a 4.8 LPA package.

name: Harish
text: The DevOps program is intensive and highly relevant. Building automated CI/CD pipelines and working with Docker and Ansible prepared me for real corporate challenges. I successfully joined Accenture as a DevOps Engineer with a solid 7.5 LPA package.

name: Divya
text: EduPrajna provided me with solid foundations in AI and Machine Learning. The capstone project on neural networks was highly appreciated by the interviewers at Infosys. I landed my dream job as an AI Engineer with a great package of 9.2 LPA.

name: Sandhya
text: The UI/UX design course was extremely practical. We learned user research, wireframing, and interactive prototyping. Building a polished portfolio of real client projects was key to landing my role as a UI/UX Designer at Capgemini with a 5.5 LPA package.

name: Manoj
text: Mastering statistics, Python, and data modeling at EduPrajna gave me a strong edge. The mentors are industry practitioners who share real project insights, which helped me clear the data science rounds at Tech Mahindra and join them as a Data Scientist at 6.8 LPA.
